title: Jesus Loves Me
author: Anna Bartlett Warner
story: Originally a poem in Susan Warner's novel 'Say and Seal,' spoken to comfort a dying child. Bradbury added the chorus 'Yes, Jesus loves me!' It became the most widely sung children's hymn in history.

lines: This I know, For the Bible tells me so
They are weak, but He is strong
He who died Heaven's gate to open wide
He will wash away my sin, Let His little child come in
He will stay Close beside me all the way
Thou hast bled and died for me, I will henceforth live for Thee
